title: MOME — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Mayor's Office of Media & Entertainment (MOME) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the MOME Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us — Film Permits tg4x-b46p, MARCH Inspections b84a-xy2t), nyc.gov/site/mome, and the login-walled 'MOME E-Apply' film-permit portal (nyceventpermits.nyc.gov/film). Includes the NYC geography spine that the Film Permits dataset keys on (borough, community board, police precinct, ZIP).

BoroughList.description: One or more boroughs. In the Film Permits dataset ('Borough') this is a comma-separated list because a single shoot can span boroughs (e.g. 'Manhattan, Brooklyn').

Coordinates.description: WGS84 point. Not carried by Film Permits (tg4x-b46p) but present on the DOT filming-permit twin and geocodable from ParkingHeld.

Geography.description: The NYC geography spine shared across MOME datasets — the join keys back to the rest of city government. In Film Permits these arrive as comma-separated lists ('CommunityBoard(s)', 'PolicePrecinct(s)', 'ZipCode(s)').

councilDistrict.description: NYC Council district ('Council district' — MARCH Inspections).

country.description: 'Country' (Film Permits — almost always United States of America).

PermitEventType.description: Permit event type ('EventType' in Film Permits).
enum: Theater Load in and Load Out

ContactInfo.description: Applicant / production contact details (from the E-Apply intake; never published to Open Data).
